content:
As legal teams grapple with rising data volumes, a new kind of professional is stepping into the spotlight: The Legal Data Intelligence practitioner. 

Explore how organizations are creating LDI positions to manage increasingly complex data challenges, and why cross-functional skills are becoming essential across the legal industry.
comment: As LDI roles emerge, biggest gap I see is ownership of data lineage during litigation holds—if legal vs IT boundaries stay fuzzy, defensibility gets harder, not easier.
